data.name: Sellsword Tales Prologue
data.detailed_description:
Sellsword Tales is a nonlinear visual novel with RPG and quest elements. This blend of genres creates a rich fantasy world filled with danger and incredible discoveries!

A lot of events await Tabitha along her adventure. The outcome of the whole story depends on how she behaves. The choice is yours!

Some characters will become your enemies, while others can become allies you can trust. It’s up to you to decide whether these relationships stay as friendships or develop into something more. Your choices will affect how these connections evolve throughout the story.

The main heroine decides to set out on a journey, taking her family’s heirloom armor and sword.

Will she find loyal friends and companions, acquire powerful weapons and legendary artifacts, and stand against evil and injustice?

And will she have the strength to resist the demonic temptation that awaits her?

Magical creatures, monsters, and beasts, depraved cultists, and greedy bandits - all await the heroine on her challenging path to glory!
Engage in exciting turn-based battles and earn valuable rewards.

In addition to combat challenges, players will encounter various mini-games designed to add variety to the gameplay.

Write your own story in the world of Sellsword Tales!

data.short_description: A young warrior leaves home on a journey filled with battles and new encounters. Your choices affect not only the outcome of fights but also the relationships you build. Will they stay friends, or will something more develop? The path is yours to decide…

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB display memory
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 4000 MB 可用空間
